# Technical Documentation

## General Description
Gradient boosting classifier for loan application credit scoring.

## Design
Two-stage pipeline: feature engineering + model inference.

## Development
Trained on historical application data (2018-2023).

## Monitoring
Weekly accuracy checks against holdout set.

## Performance
AUC-ROC: 0.87. F1-score: 0.82.

## Intended Purpose
Automated credit scoring for consumer loan applications under EUR 50,000.
